name: stm32f401ce_blackpill_usb_cdc_golden
description: STM32F401 Black Pill USB CDC pack for the local DAPLink SWD bench. Stage1 proves target USB CDC enumeration and host port open over the board USB port. Stage2 proves host-driven PING/PONG over the same target USB CDC link. Stage3 proves host-driven ECHO over the same link.
